name: Multi-Service Debug
prompt:
You have 3 independent Python services, each with bugs causing test failures:

1. auth_service/ — JWT authentication service (some tests failing)
2. data_pipeline/ — Data processing pipeline (some tests failing)
3. task_scheduler/ — Task scheduling system (some tests failing)

For each service, debug and fix the bugs so all tests pass. Do not modify test files.

Run tests with: cd <service_dir> && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v

criteria.description: auth_service pytest suite fully passes (all tests, previously-failing tests included)
data_pipeline pytest suite fully passes (all tests, previously-failing tests included)
task_scheduler pytest suite fully passes (all tests, previously-failing tests included)

origin.notes: imported from SkillOS paper E4 parallelism experiment
